_comment: Top NY/NJ/CT tri-state property management companies, hand-curated from public web presence and known management portfolios. Domains verified reachable as of 2026-05-10. For Driver C (tri-state mgmt-co host expansion) — post-OCR state routing handles cross-state hits.
_methodology: Picked from common NYC condo/coop mgmt companies + the dominant LI suburban and Westchester managers. Many cover all three states; site:<domain> queries will surface docs across NY/NJ/CT and the bank routes by OCR-detected state.

FirstService Residential.notes: National; very large NY metro + LI footprint; some Westchester; some NJ/CT

AKAM Associates.notes: Manhattan luxury condos + coops; also Long Island

Charles H. Greenthal & Co.notes: Large NYC residential mgmt (coops + condos), 100+ buildings

Cooper Square Realty / Andrews.notes: NYC condos/coops; also rebranded under Andrews Building Corp

Halstead Management Company.notes: NYC, formerly Halstead Property; now Compass-aligned

Brown Harris Stevens.notes: Manhattan condos + coops mgmt arm; also Hamptons

Douglas Elliman Property Management.notes: DE PM arm; NYC + Long Island + Hamptons + Westchester + some CT

Westchester Residential Opportunities.notes: Westchester housing — likely advocacy not mgmt; verify
